query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagramPostId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ig_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinPublished = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linkedin_ok,
  SUM(CASE WHEN facebookPublished = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as facebook_ok,
  SUM(COALESCE(likes, 0)) as total_likes,
  SUM(COALESCE(comments, 0)) as total_comments
FROM posts WHERE status = 'published';
